# Twitch Advanced SQLite Analysis

**Dataset Timeline:** Metrics captured across the 2023 - 2024 streaming calendar.

This portfolio project leverages Python, Pandas, and SQLite to run data pipelines and extract meaningful business insights from streaming data tracking the Top 1000 Twitch Streamers.

### 1. Top 5 Most Streamed Games Overall
*Generated by grouping the dataset by game titles and counting unique broadcaster entries. This identifies market saturation and directory popularity, showing where the highest density of creator competition exists.*

| most_streamed_game   |   streamer_count |
|:---------------------|-----------------:|
| Just Chatting        |              257 |
| League of Legends    |               84 |
| Grand Theft Auto V   |               74 |
| VALORANT             |               60 |
| Casino               |               36 |

---

### 2. Average Followers by Language (Languages with >10 Streamers)
*Calculated by averaging total subscriber counts across distinct language demographics. Broadcasters are filtered out if their language group has fewer than 11 representatives to eliminate skewing from statistical anomalies.*

| language   |   avg_followers |   total_streamers |
|:-----------|----------------:|------------------:|
| Spanish    |         1776153 |               106 |
| English    |         1133736 |               401 |
| Portuguese |          775176 |                82 |
| French     |          766026 |                72 |
| Italian    |          740930 |                13 |

---

### 3. Stream Duration Tiers vs. Average Followers Gained
*Uses a conditional CASE statement to bin broadcast sessions into duration tiers. By aggregating the average follower gain per stream against these groups, the data exposes the relationship between broadcast length and viewer conversion efficiency.*

| stream_length       |   avg_followers_gained |
|:--------------------|-----------------------:|
| Short (Under 4 hrs) |                   3882 |
| Medium (4 to 8 hrs) |                   3374 |
| Long (Over 8 hrs)   |                   2605 |

---

### 4. Top Games for Individual Streamer Follower Growth
*Isolates individual channel velocity by measuring the average follower acquisition rate per live session. This highlights which specific gaming categories yield the highest return on investment for new creator exposure.*

| most_streamed_game   |   avg_followers_gained |
|:---------------------|-----------------------:|
| Fitness & Health     |                   9640 |
| Super Mario Odyssey  |                   9500 |
| Team Fortress 2      |                   8900 |
| GeoGuessr            |                   8460 |
| Madden NFL 24        |                   7574 |

---

### 5. Streamer Growth Efficiency Profile (Followers Generated per Hour)
*Utilizes a Common Table Expression (CTE) to establish a baseline performance KPI: follower acquisition scaled against total broadcast volume. Channels with fewer than 1,000 streamed hours are omitted to spotlight highly optimized, long-term talent profiles.*

| name      | most_streamed_game   |   efficiency_score |
|:----------|:---------------------|-------------------:|
| ninja     | Fortnite             |           15236.6  |
| sypherpk  | Fortnite             |            4381.31 |
| auronplay | Minecraft            |            3636.77 |
| fortnite  | Fortnite             |            3406.72 |
| elmariana | Just Chatting        |            2823.15 |

---

### 6. Most Optimized Day of the Week to Stream per Game
*Leverages a window function (`ROW_NUMBER() OVER`) to partition aggregate viewer metrics by category title. The logic computes growth performance per day, ranks them independently within each game marketplace, and returns only the single most profitable broadcast day.*

| most_streamed_game             | best_day   |   avg_growth |
|:-------------------------------|:-----------|-------------:|
| Minecraft                      | Wednesday  |        18808 |
| Fortnite                       | Tuesday    |        10043 |
| Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six Siege | Monday     |         9670 |
| Fitness & Health               | Saturday   |         9640 |
| Super Mario Odyssey            | Tuesday    |         9500 |

---
